institution.name: City Colleges of Chicago-Malcolm X College

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at City Colleges of Chicago-Malcolm X College are 16% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($32.4k vs $38.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at City Colleges of Chicago-Malcolm X College rose 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.0k → $8.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at City Colleges of Chicago-Malcolm X College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at City Colleges of Chicago-Malcolm X College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2k → 6.4k).
